calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Nimer Massis Further Responses To Form Interrogatries, Set One, Number 15.1; Request For Sanctions For Sanctions Plaintiff And His Attorney Of Record, Frank Kim, In The Amount Of $1,160
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
